'''√s-?-?''' ('''sae''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:walk|walk]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-?-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:walk|walk]]
|-
! Citation form
| √s-?-?
|-
! Lemma
| sae
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisa?a?|thisa?a?]] || [[word:jisa?a?|jisa?a?]] || [[word:shisa?a?|shisa?a?]] || [[word:kisa?a?|kisa?a?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusa?a?|thuthusa?a?]] || [[word:jujusa?a?|jujusa?a?]] || [[word:shushusa?a?|shushusa?a?]] || [[word:kukusa?a?|kukusa?a?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusa?a?|thusa?a?]] || [[word:jusa?a?|jusa?a?]] || [[word:shusa?a?|shusa?a?]] || [[word:kusa?a?|kusa?a?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusa?a?|thusa?a?]] || [[word:jusa?a?|jusa?a?]] || [[word:shusa?a?|shusa?a?]] || [[word:kusa?a?|kusa?a?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesa?a?|thesa?a?]] || [[word:jesa?a?|jesa?a?]] || [[word:shesa?a?|shesa?a?]] || [[word:kesa?a?|kesa?a?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosa?a?|thothosa?a?]] || [[word:jojosa?a?|jojosa?a?]] || [[word:shoshosa?a?|shoshosa?a?]] || [[word:kokosa?a?|kokosa?a?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosa?a?|thosa?a?]] || [[word:josa?a?|josa?a?]] || [[word:shosa?a?|shosa?a?]] || [[word:kosa?a?|kosa?a?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosa?a?|thosa?a?]] || [[word:josa?a?|josa?a?]] || [[word:shosa?a?|shosa?a?]] || [[word:kosa?a?|kosa?a?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsa?a?|thæsa?a?]] || [[word:jæsa?a?|jæsa?a?]] || [[word:shæsa?a?|shæsa?a?]] || [[word:kæsa?a?|kæsa?a?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasa?a?|thathasa?a?]] || [[word:jajasa?a?|jajasa?a?]] || [[word:shashasa?a?|shashasa?a?]] || [[word:kakasa?a?|kakasa?a?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasa?a?|thasa?a?]] || [[word:jasa?a?|jasa?a?]] || [[word:shasa?a?|shasa?a?]] || [[word:kasa?a?|kasa?a?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasa?a?|thasa?a?]] || [[word:jasa?a?|jasa?a?]] || [[word:shasa?a?|shasa?a?]] || [[word:kasa?a?|kasa?a?]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasa?a?|shasa?a?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasa?a?|goshasa?a?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasa?a?|gokishasa?a?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasa?a?nü|shasa?a?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nknü|goshasa?a?nknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?nü|gokishasa?a?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasa?a?shë|shasa?a?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkshë|goshasa?a?nkshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?shë|gokishasa?a?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasa?a?ro|shasa?a?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkro|goshasa?a?nkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?ro|gokishasa?a?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasa?a?mu|shasa?a?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkmu|goshasa?a?nkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?mu|gokishasa?a?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasa?a?sher|shasa?a?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nksher|goshasa?a?nksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?sher|gokishasa?a?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasa?a?ng|shasa?a?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkng|goshasa?a?nkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?ng|gokishasa?a?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasa?a?ya|shasa?a?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkya|goshasa?a?nkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?ya|gokishasa?a?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasa?a?yam|shasa?a?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkyam|goshasa?a?nkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?yam|gokishasa?a?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasa?a?nüshë|shasa?a?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nknüshë|goshasa?a?nknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?nüshë|gokishasa?a?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasa?a?nüro|shasa?a?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nknüro|goshasa?a?nknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?nüro|gokishasa?a?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasa?a?nümu|shasa?a?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nknümu|goshasa?a?nknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?nümu|gokishasa?a?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasa?a?shënü|shasa?a?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkshënü|goshasa?a?nkshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?shënü|gokishasa?a?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasa?a?shëro|shasa?a?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkshëro|goshasa?a?nkshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?shëro|gokishasa?a?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasa?a?shëmu|shasa?a?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkshëmu|goshasa?a?nkshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?shëmu|gokishasa?a?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasa?a?ronü|shasa?a?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkronü|goshasa?a?nkronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?ronü|gokishasa?a?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasa?a?roshë|shasa?a?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkroshë|goshasa?a?nkroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?roshë|gokishasa?a?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasa?a?romu|shasa?a?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkromu|goshasa?a?nkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?romu|gokishasa?a?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasa?a?munü|shasa?a?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkmunü|goshasa?a?nkmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?munü|gokishasa?a?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasa?a?mushë|shasa?a?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkmushë|goshasa?a?nkmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?mushë|gokishasa?a?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasa?a?muro|shasa?a?muro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasa?a?nkmuro|goshasa?a?nkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasa?a?muro|gokishasa?a?muro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
